message.content: ```plantuml @startuml title create file, add, reset, delete skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam shadowing false skinparam roundcorner 25 skinparam sequence { ParticipantPadding 60 BoxPadding 20 LifeLineBorderColor #666666 LifeLineBorderThickness 1 LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent ArrowColor #222222 ArrowThickness 2 MessageAlign left } skinparam actor { BorderColor #666666 FontSize 22 } skinparam participant { BorderColor #666666 FontSize 22 } skinparam database { BorderColor #666666 BackgroundColor #E9E9FF FontSize 22 } actor User box "GIT jalbertomr.blogspot.com" #E6E6E6 participant "Working dir" as WD participant "Stage" as ST database "History" as HIS end box note over WD end note note over WD #FF5A5A Working dir end note note over ST #98FB98 Stage end note note over HIS History end note == create file2, add, reset, delete == User -> WD : create file2 note over ST #FF8A80 file2 created end note WD -> ST : git add file2 . note over ST #98FB98 file2 created end note ST -> WD : git [ reset | reset file2 | reset HEAD file2 ] . note over ST #FF8A80 file2 created end note User <-- WD : delete file2 @enduml ```
